productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Ez Desert Boot Olive Shoes
description: Sporty and ultra-comfortable, these adidas NEO Label EZ Desert boots take the classic sandy terrain style to a contemporary and suave silhouette. A minimally constructed shoe, paramount attention is given to shape and detail. The signature adidas 3-stripes are simply perforated on the midfoot and a hint of fresh turquoise on the collar adds some tang to the, otherwise polished, olive colour leather upper.UpperAniline leather upperAdidas patented 3-Stripes perforated on the midfoot for breathability and heightened styleLacing system for snug FitSoft leather tongue with branding and padded sockliner for all-day comfortBranding at the heelMidsoleAdidas Vibesurround enhanced comfort system midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionPU/molded EVA footbed for instant step-in comfort.OutsoleGeometric grooves for greater tractionShoe careBrush dirt and dust off the surface and treat surface with leather impregnation sprayDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
